creative_brief: Split screen showing a long-haul truck on highway vs Rachel's cattle peacefully grazing in green NSW pastures.
primary_text: Last Tuesday Rachel Ward watched another truck full of Queensland beef drive past her regenerative farm in Kempsey. Sydney families were eating meat that had travelled 2,400km while her pasture-raised cattle grazed right here in NSW. Now her beef goes direct to Sydney families via FarmThru. No middlemen. No 2,400km journeys. Just fresh food from farms you can actually visit. Order when you want. Collect from Brookvale Monday to Friday.
headline: Why was Sydney eating Queensland beef?
description: Rachel's NSW cattle were right there. Now Sydney families can buy direct from her farm via FarmThru's Brookvale hub.
